name: cymclaw-polish
prompt:
Fix and polish the CymClaw project at /Users/admin/workspace/cymclaw

Read all files in the project first.

## FIXES NEEDED

### 1. Wrong GitHub repo URLs
All references to 'cympack/cymclaw' should be 'cympotek/CymClaw':
- README.md: install URL, git clone URL
- package.json: repository.url
- install.sh: npm install URL, curl URL
- Any other files with wrong repo URL

### 2. Missing .env.example
Create .env.example with:
- GEMINI_API_KEY=your-gemini-api-key
- CYMCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT=8899
- CYMCLAW_UI_PORT=3847
- CYMCLAW_SANDBOX_NAME=cymclaw-sandbox
- CYMCLAW_NETWORK=cymclaw-isolated
- CYMCLAW_LOG_LEVEL=info

### 3. Missing GitHub Actions CI
Create .github/workflows/ci.yml:
- Test on Ubuntu 22.04 and macOS-latest
- Node.js 22
- Run: npm test
- Run: docker build sandbox/
- Lint check

### 4. Missing CONTRIBUTING.md
Create basic contributing guide

### 5. README improvements
- Add proper ASCII art banner for CymClaw
- Add architecture diagram (text-based)
- Add comparison table vs NemoClaw vs raw Docker
- Fix all URLs to cympotek/CymClaw
- Add badges: CI status, license, node version
- Add 'How It Works' section
- Add 'Security' section summary
- Add 'FAQ' section

### 6. Gateway server improvements
In gateway/server.js:
- Add proper error handling for Gemini API failures
- Add request/response logging to file (audit trail)
- Add rate limiting
- Add health check endpoint (/health)
- Add CORS headers for UI

### 7. Web UI improvements
In ui/index.html, ui/app.js, ui/style.css:
- Add CymClaw logo/branding (text-based, blue #2563eb)
- Add real-time status updates (poll /health endpoint)
- Add audit log viewer (recent API calls)
- Add model selector dropdown
- Add dark/light mode toggle
- Make it mobile-responsive
- Add 'Network Whitelist' editor (add/remove endpoints)
- Add 'Start/Stop Sandbox' buttons that call the API

### 8. CLI improvements
In bin/cymclaw.js:
- Add ASCII art banner on startup
- Add --version flag
- Add 'cymclaw doctor' command (check Docker, Node, network)
- Add 'cymclaw update' command (self-update from GitHub)
- Improve error messages with helpful suggestions

### 9. Sandbox Dockerfile
- Pin openclaw version properly
- Add tzdata for timezone support
- Add Python 3 (for skills that need it)
- Add proper HEALTHCHECK

### 10. Security hardening
- Review seccomp profile — ensure it blocks dangerous syscalls
- Add AppArmor profile template (Linux)
- Document security model in docs/security.md (expand existing)

### 11. Policy presets
- Add a 'minimal' preset (only Gemini, nothing else)
- Add a 'development' preset (more permissive for testing)
- Add comments to each preset explaining what it allows

### 12. Tests
- Add more test cases in test/
- Test gateway proxy functionality
- Test policy loading
- Test Docker commands (mock)

### 13. package.json
- Fix repository URL to cympotek/CymClaw
- Add 'homepage' field
- Add 'keywords' field
- Add proper 'description'

## IMPORTANT
- All code must be working, not stubs
- Keep the Apache 2.0 license
- Use pnpm not npm
- Maintain the CymClaw branding (blue #2563eb)
- Gateway must actually proxy to Gemini API correctly
- UI must be functional (not just mockup)
- Commit message: 'polish: comprehensive project improvements'
